ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Alishahryar1/free-claude-code
Language: python
Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ComposioHQ/awesome-codex-skills
Language: python
A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: HunxByts/GhostTrack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/HunxByts/GhostTrack
Language: python
Useful tool to track location or mobile number

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MemoriLabs/Memori
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MemoriLabs/Memori
Language: python
Memori is agent-native memory infrastructure. A LLM-agnostic layer that turns agent execution and conversation into structured, persistent state for production systems.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PostHog/posthog
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PostHog/posthog
Language: python
🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Universal-Commerce-Protocol/ucp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Universal-Commerce-Protocol/ucp
Language: python
Specification and documentation for the Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP)

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Language: python
General plug-and-play inference library for Recursive Language Models (RLMs), supporting various sandboxes.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/roboflow/rf-detr
Language: python
[ICLR 2026] RF-DETR is a real-time object detection and segmentation model architecture developed by Roboflow, SOTA on COCO, designed for fine-tuning.
